title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.660 - Trustee in disincorporation — compensation
text:
80.660.  Trustee in disincorporation — compensation. — The trustee shall receive for his services such compensation as the commission shall think reasonable.
(RSMo 1939 § 7304) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7153; 1919 § 8602; 1909 § 9490
